data.title: As a skill author, my commits are blocked if eval configs contain TODO placeholders
data.description:
## Description

**What**: A commit-time guard in record-test-status.sh that scans staged eval configs and blocks commits containing TODO markers, empty test lists, or configs missing llm-rubric assertions.

**Why**: Eval failures are non-blocking at commit time (by design). The TODO guard is the sole hard enforcement mechanism preventing incomplete eval scaffolds from shipping. It must be zero-tolerance with no fail-open paths.

**Scope**:
- IN: New code block in record-test-status.sh (safeguard file), scans staged */evals/promptfooconfig.yaml files, blocks on TODO markers + empty tests: list + missing llm-rubric type
- OUT: Modifying run-skill-evals.sh _validate_config(), eval execution, API key gating

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, committing a staged evals/promptfooconfig.yaml containing a TODO marker blocks the commit with a clear message identifying the file(s) and placeholder(s)
  ← Satisfies: "commit-time guard... scans all staged evals/promptfooconfig.yaml files for TODO markers and blocks the commit"
- When this story is complete, committing a staged eval config with an empty tests: list or no llm-rubric assertion type also blocks the commit
  ← Satisfies: "also rejects configs with an empty tests: list... requires at least one llm-rubric assertion type"
- When this story is complete, the TODO guard executes BEFORE the existing skill eval invocation in record-test-status.sh, runs unconditionally (not gated on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or npx availability), and blocks the commit independently of whether evals run. The guard is the authoritative static scan; run-skill-evals.sh _validate_config() remains unchanged as defense-in-depth.
  ← Satisfies: "runs unconditionally as a static text scan... not gated on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and has no fail-open paths"
- When this story is complete, the guard scans all staged files matching */evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (not limited to plugins/dso/skills/)
  ← Satisfies: guard scope covers host project eval configs as well as plugin configs
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] record-test-status.sh is a safeguard file (CLAUDE.md rule 18) — modifications require explicit user approval. Must preserve existing SIGURG/resume, RED markers, merge commit filtering behavior.
- [Reliability] Guard has no fail-open paths — any code path that exits 0 when TODOs are present is a correctness bug
